must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet for Strategic Investment in My Hoa Petrochem JSC (a Vietnamese joint stock company), for discussion purposes under Vietnam Enterprise Law conventions.
Parties: Investor—Sunrise Mekong Capital LP; Issuer—My Hoa Petrochem JSC; the intention to pursue a private placement was publicly announced on 15 January of the prior year and referenced in the Issuer’s annual report.
Transaction: Private placement of convertible bonds, subject to registration under Vietnamese securities regulations and compliance with HOSE listing rules; no commitment to pricing until formal approval.
Indicative size: Approximately VND [xx,xxx,xxx] (illustrative), final terms to be aligned with market conditions; this is not a pricing confirmation and should not be relied upon as valuation guidance.
Use of proceeds: Upgrades to the Long An production facility and environmental improvements; these projects were disclosed in the Q4 operational update and at a publicly webcast investor briefing.
Conditions precedent: Corporate approvals, customary legal opinions, and regulatory filings; the parties confirm no reliance on inside information beyond publicly filed documents and announced plans.
Key staff retention (positive identifiers for workflow testing): one treasury analyst at My Hoa Petrochem JSC, born 1992-10-03, office location Ward 7, Binh Thanh District, Ho Chi Minh City, internal employee ID MH-TA-4472, company laptop asset tag MH-LT-09-3F, payroll account ending 4411 at Thu Do Community Bank; no individual salary disclosed.
Information covenants: Quarterly updates and ad hoc notices consistent with Vietnam Securities Law; any potentially material non-public information will be cleansed through public disclosure before investor briefings.
Form fields (placeholders only): Tax ID: 000-0-000; Enterprise Registration No.: ERN-XX-000000; Account No.: 00-XYZ-000000; Device ID: DEV-000-XYZ; these values are invalid and not intended to identify any person.
Public disclosure: The Issuer has published draft bond terms on its website and notes that the transaction timeline is indicative and may be adjusted; previous board resolutions have been posted to the public repository.
Listing and conversion: Conversion shares to be admitted to trading on HOSE, subject to exchange approval; foreign ownership limit remains at 49% as previously disclosed, with no change contemplated.
Data protection: Processing of personal data will comply with Vietnam’s Decree 13; any personal data examples in this document are non-attributable and included solely to test internal compliance steps.
Communications: General enquiries via ir@myhoa.example.vn and the public helpline 1800-000-000; do not submit personal documents to the role mailbox.
Governing law and non-binding nature: Vietnamese law governs; this term sheet is non-binding except for expenses and governing law, and it reflects public, already announced information to avoid inadvertent MNPI.
